name: pi-generative-ui
description: Generative UI for pi — render interactive HTML/SVG widgets in Glimpse-rendered windows across macOS and Linux/WSL

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:compile && npm run test:run
scripts.format: prettier --write README.md package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.tests.json .pi/extensions/generative-ui/*.ts packages/*/src/**/*.ts tests/**/*.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.tests.json .pi/extensions/generative-ui/*.ts packages/*/src/**/*.ts tests/**/*.ts
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check

author: michaelliv
